headline: Alliant Energy Corp (NASDAQ:LNT) Technical Breakout Setup Signals Potential Upside
summary: Alliant Energy (LNT) shows a solid uptrend with a 7 Technical Rating and a tight consolidation pattern scoring 9 for setup quality. A potential breakout entry at $74.07 is identified with clear risk levels.
